[00:00:00.00] Welcome back to the show. I'd like to point out how ridiculous this piece of trash is that I found.

[00:00:38.16] You can really smell that a laskin reindeer from outside the bag. Here we are.
[00:00:45.76] Delivering this food too. Shannon. Shannon. Shannon L. Don't you know you're about to eat a
[00:00:52.64] fucking endangered species? Yeah. Just ran into the car.
